headline: 新片火热上映，《火遮眼》《痴迷》领跑
headlineEn: New Films Heat Up Screens, 'Fire Shrouds Eyes' and 'Obsession' Lead
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：本周新片《痴迷》《火遮眼》持续霸榜，《海洋奇缘：启航》紧随其后。多部大片即将上映，市场热度不减。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: This week's new films 'Obsession' and 'Fire Shrouds Eyes' continue to dominate, with 'Moana: Voyage' close behind. Several blockbusters are upcoming, keeping the market hot.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但市场热度不减
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but market remains hot

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等备受期待
《安昂传奇》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将来袭
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' coming soon
